relation_types.description: A makes B reachable but does not produce it
A initiates B as a side process
A restores a safe state after B
A is the escalation produced by B
A asserts B has occurred (validation predicate)
A and B cannot both hold

rules: causal claims are declared, never inferred from co-occurrence
every causal claim names its relation type and provenance
absence of cause => the outcome cannot be asserted
causality respects state transitions declared by EXECUTION_GOVERNANCE
no causal link may bypass validation predicates
